name: Suggestions
short: Numbered suggestion system with vote reactions, staff review and DM notifications.
description: Members submit suggestions with /suggest; each one becomes a numbered embed with upvote/downvote reactions (optionally with a discussion thread, optionally routed through a mod-review queue first). Staff approve/deny/consider suggestions with a reason — the embed is recolored, a status field is added and the suggester is notified via DM (best effort). Bilingual (DE/EN), with web dashboard integration.
author: Domekologe
install_msg:
Thanks for installing Suggestions!

Load it with `[p]load suggestions`, set a channel with `[p]suggestset channel #channel`, then members can use `/suggest`. Configure the rest via commands or the PDC web dashboard (if installed).
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores submitted suggestions per server: suggestion ID, the author's Discord user ID, the suggestion text, message ID, status and decision reason. Author IDs are anonymized on data deletion requests; users can export their own suggestions.
